# pihole_clients (Data Source)

Fetches all clients.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pihole_clients" "all" {}

output "all_clients" {
  value = data.pihole_clients.all.clients
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `clients` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--clients))

<a id="nestedatt--clients"></a>
### Nested Schema for `clients`

Read-Only:

- `client` (String)
- `comment` (String)
- `groups` (List of Number)
- `id` (String)
